title: Android Audio Shim
description: Enables Simple Voice Chat microphone and speaker on Android (arm64)
body:
Android Audio Shim

Enables **Simple Voice Chat** mod to work on Android devices running MojoLauncher or PojavLauncher.

 Features
- Microphone input via AAudio (mono)
- Speaker output via OpenSL ES (stereo, positional audio)
- Self-extracting — no manual setup required

 Requirements
- Android 8.0+
- arm64 architecture only
- MojoLauncher or PojavLauncher

 Installation
1. Add `audio-shim.jar` to your mods folder
2. Launch Minecraft
3. Open Simple Voice Chat settings and select the new microphone source

 Notes
- The mod will not appear in the mod list — this is expected
- To remove the error message in chat: open `voicechat-client.properties` and set `use_natives=false`
- Only tested with Simple Voice Chat, other voice mods are not guaranteed to work

 Compatibility
- Forge and Fabric
- Minecraft 1.12.2+
